title: Shri Bhairav Baba Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Bhairav Baba Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Shri Bhairav Baba.
description:
Jai Bhairav Deva, Prabhu Jai Bhairav Deva.
Jai Kali aur Gaura Devi krit seva॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Tumhi paap uddharak, dukh sindhu taarak.
Bhakton ke sukh kaarak, bhishan vapu dhaarak॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Vaahan shwan virajat, kar trishul dhaari.
Mahima amit tumhari, jai jai bhaykaari॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Tum bin Deva seva, safal nahi honve.
Chaumukh deepak darshan, dukh sagre khonve॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Tel chatki dadhi mishrit, bhashavali teri.
Kripa kariye Bhairav, kariye nahi deri॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Paanv ghunghru baajat, aru damru damkaavat.
Batuknath ban baalak, jan man harshaavat॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

Batuknath ji ki aarti, jo koi nar gaavein.
Kahein Dharanidhar nar, manvanchit phal paavein॥
॥ Jai Bhairav Deva ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Shri Bhairav Baba's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to eliminate fear, destroy negative energies, and seek protection from enemies.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Bhairav Baba?
faq.a2: Sunday and Tuesday are considered the most auspicious days for worshipping Bhairav Baba.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Baba Bhairav during Aarti?
faq.a3: Baba Bhairav is fond of Jalebi, Imarti, black sesame seeds, and milk or curd.
faq.q4: Can Shri Bhairav Baba's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can worship him at home, though it is traditionally considered best to place his idol near the main entrance or outside.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Bhairavaya Namah' or 'Jai Bhairav Deva' is very effective after the Aarti.
